title: DECIDE body (OWNER PLANE ONLY — never exposed to Speakers)

actor.description: Decision actor + channel, e.g. owner:whatsapp:+9665… or owner:dashboard:<session>. Recorded verbatim in the audit trail (§10).

modification.description: approve-with-modification (§7.4): replacement values, keys restricted to the verb's `modifiable` facts. Triggers re-resolve + re-preview + re-tier; if tier rises, the proposal re-parks. Only meaningful when approved=true.
